caption: The video takes place in a formal meeting room, as indicated by the on-screen text "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage," dated "April 12, 2019," with an "ORCA" logo. The scene begins with a close-up of a man in a dark suit and tie sitting at a table with a blue tissue box and a green water bottle. The view then widens to reveal a panel of individuals. A man with glasses and a bald head sits in a dark suit, while another man with a beard, wearing a blue blazer and glasses, gestures with his hands while speaking. A third man in a light-colored shirt and a gray vest stands behind them. In later frames, a woman with brown hair wearing a brown jacket and a colorful scarf is seen sitting at the table, writing on a document. The table is cluttered with water bottles, coffee cups, and papers.
